title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Asian Paints - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Asian Paints - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints:
Asian Paints is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints!
